allow: Bash(powershell -Command '\(Get-Content '\\''__TRACKED_VAR__'\\''\) -replace '\\''export const revalidate = SITE_CONFIG.revalidateSeconds;'\\'', '\\''export const revalidate = 3600;'\\'' | Set-Content '\\''__TRACKED_VAR__'\\''')
